name: Low-Fat Vegetable Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 oz) frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions. Drain and let cool.
2. In a bowl, combine 1&1/2 cups cottage cheese, spinach, carrots, zucchini, mozzarella cheese, salt, and egg (or eggbeaters).
3. Cut the cooled lasagna into squares to fit an 8X8 baking dish.
4. Place a layer of lasagna in the bottom of a greased 8X8 dish. Spread with half the cheese mixture.
5. Cover with small ends of lasagna, then spread with the remaining cheese mixture and lasagna.
6. In a skillet, sauté onion in oil until tender. Stir in flour, nutmeg, and pepper.
7. Add chicken broth and remaining cottage cheese to the skillet. Cook, stirring constantly, for about two minutes. If needed, add more broth to reach medium white sauce consistency.
8. Spread the sauce over the lasagna and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
9. Cover with aluminum foil and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
10. Remove foil and bake until lightly browned at 400°F for a few additional minutes.
11. Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
